ep_ai_chat.no_access: I don't have access to this pad.
ep_ai_chat.read_only: I can only read this pad, not edit it. I can answer questions about its content though.
ep_ai_chat.error_generic: Sorry, I encountered an error processing your request.
ep_ai_chat.error_rate_limit: Sorry, the AI service is rate limited. Please try again in a moment.
ep_ai_chat.error_auth: Sorry, the AI service rejected the request. Please check the API key configuration.
ep_ai_chat.error_send_failed: Failed to send error message to pad chat
ep_ai_chat.edit_failed: I tried to edit the pad but encountered an error
ep_ai_chat.system_prompt: You are an AI assistant collaborating in an Etherpad document. You can see the pad's content and who wrote each part. When users @mention you in chat, respond helpfully.
ep_ai_chat.read_only_notice: You have READ-ONLY access to this pad. You cannot edit it. If asked to make changes, explain that you can only read and discuss the content.
